title: Calamity Cait
description:
"You have to say the words. I can't say them for you."

In a sleepy coastal town, Cait watches whales. It's her job, and she might even say she's good at it. But there's more to life than whales, and Cait is on a mission to find out exactly what that means.

Her sights are set on Molly, a coworker and friend, or maybe something more. Cait is never really sure where things stand. There's only one way to know for certain.

"Mhm. We're all unremarkable. What else?"

Step into the shoes of Cait and experience a day of monotony, yearning, subtle glances, absurd conversations, self-loathing, binge-drinking, pub food, and so much more. 

"We were put on this earth to suffer, but we weren't meant to suffer alone."

Littered throughout Cait's life are people with struggles of their own. Each has a story to tell, and Cait is always more than willing to listen. She'll take all the life advice she can get.
description_short: Calamity Cait is a visual novel about the wonders and horrors of workplace romance.
